transcript.text:
[Crab Season]
[Is that a challenge?]
[Scary]
[Reply Pigeons]
[Taean Sinduri Coastal Dune]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Taean today
At a coastal dune
I see the ocean there
And this is all sand like the desert
The sand over there makes it look like a castle
[The largest sand dune in Korea designated as a natural monument]
[This place is also known for the movie set of "Mother"]
I'm hungry
Looks pretty run down
Really shabby Not sure if you can see

I was told that this restaurant holds 30 years of tradition
Let's head inside
[Mageompo Port Dock Sashimi Restaurant]
It's famous It will be crowded
It's really popular
They're known for their baby anchovies
We come here every year
[Baby anchovy mix]
[Cuttlefish with cold soup]
I'll go ahead and start with about 3kg of crabs, please
Can you eat it all? Absolutely
My husband is a huge fan
His wish is to take a photo with you
Is this the anchovy?
And baby shrimp on the side
How can I possibly eat this!?

Really delicious
That's good
Baby anchovies
I heard they die as soon as you catch them
Sashimi Let's try it
Amazing
Thank you
That's a lot
Bon appetit
I wonder if they are berried
Do you see the red? It looks filled
Nevermind It's just red
It has roes!
It's very savory
It looks tasty
Can you see the roe?

This is it
Amazing, right?
That's insane
So good
Blue crabs have the best meat
It's just very sweet
This is amazing
You have to have these in the Spring So good
It's no joke when the meat gets stuck in between your teeth
Amazing
Roe
The owner's father catches these crabs
It's so good
Really?
There's so much
It's never-ending

[Ecstatic]
It's too good
The roe came out like this
So cool
I want to watch her eat in person and not on YouTube
Not from a screen
[Not enough food]
So tasty
[No way]
It's so delicious
Thank you
Please upload more It's what I live for
I subscribed when you had 70,000 subscribers
Really?
Thank you
Enjoy your meal Thank you

He seems so nice
So much roe That's crazy
Guts
That's amazing Half roe, half guts
Looks amazing
It's one of the best
It's so tasty Full of flavors and sweetness
It's out of control
Just take a look at this
Eating this makes me happy
So good
Let's scrape it
Roe and guts
I ate crayfish not too long ago And I think I've had most of crustacean food
I think this is the best
Although it's the most difficult to eat,

It's not even salty, just sweet and full of flavors
It's the best when it comes to just the meat
The only bad thing is that it's hard to eat
Lobsters are for the texture This is for the flavor
King crabs are a total hit-or-miss
Sometimes it's as good as the blue crabs
But sometimes it's just salty
The roe is huge
Oh no!
Quiet!
I'll eat the roe
Let's give it some meat
[Seagull lives matter]
[What took you so long?]
Don't leave!
Do they not eat this?

[What is that?]
[Now they know what's up]
I'm only giving out half!
[Give us everything]
[Crab roe for me]
[Crab meat for you]
[Bully]
It's all mine
They don't even know how to eat
Its guts
Amazing
Let's order some more food while we eat this
What should we get? Excuse me!
1kg of webfoot octopus, please
[Stop!]
[Farewell]

[Mad]
[First time meeting Tzuyang?]
Is that it?
Why are they so big?
Isn't that just an octopus!?
Thank you
My father caught them
Did he catch them himself?
These are not webfoot octopus, These are monsters
They're humongous
[Help me]
Please let go I'm sorry
Sorry!
They're so scary
Let's fully cook the heads
And lightly cook the legs

That looks so good
These are so good when they're lightly cooked
I like dipping it in the sesame oil with salt
So tasty
So soft
No way
Is it because they were freshly caught?
So yummy
Tender, soft, chewy, elastic, delicious
Amazing
Come here
Get in there
Looks like a webfoot octopus with the size of an octopus minor
The texture is like a common octopus
Should I try catching these too?
Maybe take home like 10

[Yeah right]
Will it have eggs?
I think there is
That's amazing
It's completely filled
How many is that? I'm sorry
How can I possibly resist?
It's so delicious
I will think of it as rice
This one too
[Spring baby octopus filled with rice]
The eggs, amazing
The eggs are good, but the guts are amazing too
They need to be eaten together
I'm sorry
Go in

I usually eat seafood from the fish market
But it's really nice eating in front of the ocean
The Yellow Sea is known for webfoot octopus and blue crabs
Is that why it's so good?
The soup is dark now It's good like this
What is this?
This is one of the best shabu broth that I've ever had
The eggs are popping out
The webfoot octopus and blue crabs are so good in the Spring
I recommend coming here to have some
Thanks everyone
[Owner's wish granted.jpg]
[Taean's photo zone]
